title: Notification No.88/2014-Cus(NT),dt. 26.9.2014
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Notification No. 88/2014 - Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 26th September, 2014 G.S.R.......(E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (aa) of sub-section (1) of section 7 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs, hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) No. 12/97-CUSTOMS (N.T.), dated the 2nd April, 1997, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R. 193 (E), dated the 2nd April, 1997, namely:- In the said notification, in the Table, against serial number 11 relating to the State of Tamil Nadu, after item (xii), in columns (3) and (4), the following item number and the entries shall respectively be inserted, namely:- (3) (4) "(xiii) Hosur, Unloading of imported goods and loading of export goods". [F.No.434/7/2011 - Cus IV] (R.P.Singh) Director (Customs) Note: The principal Notification No. 12/97-CUSTOMS (N.T.), dated the 2nd April, 1997 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide number G.S.R. 193 (E),dated the 2nd April, 1997 and last amended vide notification No 86/2014- Customs ( N.T.) , dated the 18th September 2014 vide number G.S.R.672( E),dated the 18th September 2014. -- 1 of 1 --
